seoTitle: Kawarren vs Keely — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kawarren and Keely. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kawarren and Keely.
heading: Kawarren vs Keely — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kawarren, Victoria and Keely, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keely has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kawarren (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kawarren or Keely safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kawarren has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Keely scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kawarren scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Keely scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kawarren or Keely?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keely has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
